---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something that should exist but doesn't.
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do

The problem you're trying to solve, in your own words. Skip the proposed implementation for the first sentence.

## Why the existing surface doesn't cover it

What you tried, what was friction.

## Sketch (optional)

If you already have an implementation shape in mind, drop it here. Not required.
